title: Sebi unveils life-cycle mutual funds; solution-oriented schemes scrapped — what it means for your portfolio
summary: Mutual funds will now be permitted to offer both value and contra mutual funds as long as the scheme portfolio overlap between the two schemes is not more than 50%.

title: From youth dividend to credit ready: How India’s Yuva Shakti Budget impacts first-time borrowers
summary: India's Union Budget emphasizes youth empowerment and entrepreneurship, recognizing the potential of its young population as a key driver of economic growth. title: US shares, undisclosed dividend: is BMA penalty inevitable?
summary: An Indian investor disclosed foreign shares but not the associated dividend income, assuming it was taxed in the US. The ₹20 lakh threshold for penalty under the Black Money Act pertains to foreign assets, not income. What can be done to mitigate penalties?

title: I never paid for a flight ticket in past 10 years: Ashish Lath, CEO, SaveSage
summary: In the past 10 years, Ashish Lath took 400 flights without spending any money, which includes around 80 international ones. He stayed in hotels for 100 nights without paying anything, getting 23% return on expenses in value terms by using 15 credit cards.

title: AI stocks in bubble zone? Howard Marks on how to invest in this new world

title: Global Markets | Australian shares notch best February since 2019 as earnings outshine rate headwinds
summary: Australian shares ended a muted Friday slightly ​higher, as gains in miners countered losses in banks and consumer staples, while a strong corporate season helped the benchmark clock its best February since 2019.

summary: Japan's ​benchmark Nikkei share average closed ​at a record high on Friday, posting ​its biggest monthly gain in four months, as investors bet on corporate earnings strength.

title: Compass to share real estate listings that have yet to hit the market broadly with Redfin
summary: Compass will allow its property listings that have yet to hit the broader market to appear immediately on fellow real estate brokerage Redfin's portal, part of three-year agreement announced Thursday.
